info.title: trxml2
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trxml2
## Summary
Print an enumeration of all paths in a parse tree to leaves
## Description
Read an xml file and enumerate all paths to elements in xpath syntax.
## Usage
trxml2
## Examples
cat desc.xml | trxml2
## Current version
0.23.42 Fixes to trgen templates.
